name: vid_trim
description: Cut a video to the time range [startSec, endSec]. args: {video, startSec, endSec} (video is sandbox-relative; startSec/endSec are seconds, endSec exclusive). Returns {outputPath, durationSec} where outputPath is a sandbox-relative mp4 path. Use this before vid_concat to assemble a clip from a longer source.
